input: Run video script on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected video script output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the video script workflow

input: Apply video script to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive video script analysis with evidence-tagged findings

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to video script
